name: sketch2svg-camera
description: Capture hand-drawn line art and convert it into clean, editable SVG via Groq Vision

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix server
